src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the LocalFileRAG class.
Remove the conditional property check to make the RAG service bean always available when missing, rather than requiring a specific configuration flag.

src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Update import for LocalFileRAG to reflect its new package location in the service module.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.2.1 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Set Java source and target version to 21 to align with the new JDK requirement.
Increment project version from 1.0 to 1.2 to reflect new features and fixes.
Add developer, license, SCM, and distribution management metadata for Maven Central publishing.
Import Netty BOM to manage Netty dependency versions centrally.
Upgrade commons-compress to 1.27.1 to fix CVE-2024-25710 and CVE-2024-26308.
Upgrade commons-lang3 to 3.17.0 to address potential security concerns.
Upgrade BouncyCastle libraries to 1.79 to fix CVE-2025-8916 and other vulnerabilities.
Upgrade Apache Tika to 3.2.3 and remove manual PDFBox exclusions.
Upgrade Apache POI to 5.4.0 for better file parsing support.
Remove explicit PDFBox 2.x dependencies as they are now handled by Tika 3.x.

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude generated or downloaded model files (ONNX) and Excel templates from version control to prevent large binary bloat.
Ignore temporary META-INF folders generated during JAR testing to keep the repository clean.
.gitignore.human_impl:
+# 临时提取的 META-INF 文件夹（从 JAR 测试时产生）
+/META-INF/
